title: BKSY Investment Analysis Summary
text: Overall Assessment: The article concludes that BlackSky Technology Inc. (BKSY) receives mixed grades that suggest caution for investors. Key Financial Metrics (as of May 13, 2026): Market cap: $1.5 billion (51st percentile in Professional Services), No meaningful P/E ratio due to negative earnings, Trailing 12-month revenue: $97.8 million with -89.1% profit margin, Year-over-year quarterly sales decline: -29.5%, Expected adjusted earnings: -$1.243 per share, No dividend payments. Stock Grades: Value Grade: F (Ultra Expensive) - Stock scores as Ultra Expensive with a price-to-sales ratio of 14.09 versus sector median of 1.45. Growth Grade: D (Weak) - Company shows Weak growth characteristics with negative operational cash flow trends. Momentum Grade: A (Very Strong) - Stock demonstrates strong recent price momentum at 43.9% weighted relative strength. The analysis recommends conducting thorough due diligence and using comprehensive screening tools before making investment decisions on BKSY.
